title: Upload audio + transcript to S3 session folder
description: After recording stops and transcription completes, upload recording.wav to sessions/<id>/audio/ and transcript.json to sessions/<id>/transcript/. Must use hackathon AWS profile. Handle upload failures with retry (3 attempts). Mark session audio as 'uploaded' in metadata. Large file upload should use multipart for WAV files over 100MB.
tests: Upload 100MB WAV -> completes within 60s on decent connection
Network failure mid-upload -> retries, completes on retry
Verify files in S3 match local files (checksum)
